sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Move right green to right frame using RIGHT
# Right frame interior is at cols 45-47, right green is at cols 27-29
# Need to move right by about 18 columns
# Each RIGHT moves 1 column, so need ~18 RIGHTs

# But first, let me check: does RIGHT move both greens or just one?
# Let me try 1 RIGHT to see
result = action([{'action': 'RIGHT'}])
print("After 1 RIGHT:")
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        print(f"  Green: boundary={n['boundary']}, children={n['children']}")
        for c in n['children']:
            cn = [x for x in seg['nodes'] if x['id'] == c][0]
            print(f"    Center: color={cn['color']}, boundary={cn['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
